title: Usage of torch.load can lead to untrusted code execution
description: Uses torch.load without specifying a trusted source, potentially leading to untrusted code execution.
message: Usage of torch.load without a trusted source
recommendation: Specify a trusted source for the file being loaded

noncompliant.description: Uses torch.load with an untrusted file

compliant.description: Uses torch.load with a trusted file and map_location

why_is_this_an_issue: torch.load can execute arbitrary code if the file is malicious
how_to_fix: Specify a trusted source for the file being loaded

metadata.title: Usage of torch.load can lead to untrusted code execution
